reviews.review_description:
Even though this Gorilla Tag fan game only has around ten people online, it still deserves a five-star rating because of the care, creativity, and fun it offers. The game feels welcoming and enjoyable, especially since the small player base makes the community more friendly and less toxic. Players actually get to know each other, which makes matches more fun and teamwork easier. Instead of being chaotic or overwhelming, the game feels relaxed and focused on having a good time.
Another reason this game deserves five stars is the effort put into the gameplay and design. The movement feels smooth, the maps are creative, and it stays true to what makes Gorilla Tag fun while still adding its own ideas. For a fan game with a small community, it runs well and shows clear passion from the developers. The low player count doesn’t mean low quality—it just means it’s a hidden gem. With more attention, this game has the potential to grow, and that’s why it earns a five-star rating.
Surron tag is the best game you could ever get and it’s in the 2025 valentines update ￼
